## Source: ghsa-malware (0292db5942cb01f2a498acd52f6aac98d98a73432ed10fa181f8f24ba66f74a8)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (17b0b3e98141a351fdc696be9f930f79cca353cc4bfdd71903e63226d07aac55)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'blackbird-client' @ 99.99.99 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
